articles.title: 'Bereft and beleaguered' - Mandelson messages reveal criticism of No 10
articles.description: Newly published documents show Lord Mandelson and ministers' concerns about the prime minister and Labour MPs.

articles.title: Chris Mason: Decision to appoint Mandelson continues to inflict damage
articles.description: When Sir Keir Starmer looks back on his time at No10, his decision to send Lord Mandelson to Washington will be a central part of the critique of his tenure.

articles.title: Iran warns Israeli attacks in Lebanon threaten ceasefire with US
articles.description: Earlier Israel's PM ordered strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs in response to Hezbollah rocket and drone attacks on northern Israel.

articles.title: Jeremy Bowen: Trump needs this war to end but Iran is not backing down
articles.description: Under pressure from the polls and Gulf allies, the White House is pushing for a deal but Iran wants concessions, writes BBC's international editor.
